context: Tests whether the agent correctly configures a Web App Manifest for an installable PWA storefront, including the specific field values, icon requirements, iOS HTML meta tags, and installability prerequisites.

checklist.name: start_url with tracking param
checklist.description: The manifest's start_url is set to '/?source=pwa' (not just '/' or '/?')

checklist.name: display standalone
checklist.description: The manifest's display field is set to 'standalone'

checklist.name: Icon sizes present
checklist.description: The manifest includes icons at all three sizes: 72x72, 192x192, and 512x512

checklist.name: Maskable icon purpose
checklist.description: The 192x192 and 512x512 icons have purpose set to 'any maskable' (not just 'any' or 'maskable' alone)

checklist.name: Screenshots with form_factor
checklist.description: The manifest includes a screenshots array with at least one entry that has form_factor set to 'narrow'

checklist.name: Shopping category
checklist.description: The manifest includes categories field containing 'shopping'

checklist.name: Share target
checklist.description: The manifest includes a share_target with action '/search', method 'GET', and params mapping title to 'q'

checklist.name: Apple meta tags
checklist.description: The HTML includes all three iOS tags: apple-mobile-web-app-capable (yes), apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style, and apple-touch-icon link

checklist.name: Theme-color meta
checklist.description: The HTML includes a <meta name='theme-color'> tag

checklist.name: Installability requirements
checklist.description: The NOTES.md or output mentions at least 3 of these installability requirements: HTTPS, valid manifest with 512x512 maskable icon, registered service worker, start_url responding with 200

checklist.name: No 72x72 maskable
checklist.description: The 72x72 icon does NOT have purpose 'maskable' — only the 192x192 and 512x512 do
